## [00:00 - 00:43]

Hey, I am Charlie Broadus. I've been here at Mastermind for about five years now and wow, it's been a hell of a journey. I was part of the marketing team before switching over to my current role as our managing director of product and client experience here at Mastermind. I know that's a mouthful, but basically what that means is I have the blessing of helping build your experience on Mastermind. So from this Mastermind Business System program to GG to the Business Hub and how it all works together, all the way to our customer support team and communities, I'm really lucky to be able to play a role in all that. So yes, I am insanely passionate about helping you change your life and create the success, the impact and the freedom that you deserve. Cannot wait to see how you change your corner of the world.
